sections.title: Problem
sections.purpose: Explain the paper problem and why the workflow matters.

paragraphs.topic: The workflow should produce a managed LaTeX draft.

arguments.text: The workflow turns normalized outline inputs into a managed LaTeX draft.

supports.content: The tool produces paper.tex, paper.bib, and paper.pdf as managed artifacts.

sections.title: Implications
sections.purpose: Explain how structured outputs improve later revision workflows.

paragraphs.topic: Structured planning and review artifacts enable later revision loops.

arguments.text: Stable planning and review artifacts make downstream revision workflows easier.

supports.content: A comparative table would strengthen this claim.
